_publications._publicationTitle: The scaffold protein KSR1, a novel therapeutic target for the treatment of Merlin-deficient tumors.

_contextSnippet: knockdown of KSR1 reduces cell proliferation (Ki67 index) induced by GFM by up to 71.5% (shRNA-C)...knockdown of KSR1 significantly reduced proliferation by up to 87% in KSR1 shRNA-C PDGF treated cells
details: Reduced schwannoma cell proliferation by up to 71.5% and PDGF-induced proliferation by up to 87%, with more efficient KSR1 knockdown compared to TRCN0000006226
